overview: AIOS Client Portal — a premium dark-themed dashboard for the AI Operating System service. Clients can view their six-agent team, track five-layer progress, monitor key results metrics, read daily briefings, and operators can manage all content through a built-in admin panel.
features: Dashboard home with client welcome and AIOS system status
Six AI agent cards (Business Manager, Finance Manager, Content Strategist, Operations Architect, Success Coach, Security Officer) with status and activity
Five Layers progress view (Context, Data, Intelligence, Automate, Build)
Results dashboard with key metrics: Away-From-Desk Autonomy, Task Automation %, Revenue Per Employee
Daily brief section with morning briefing from Business Manager
Built-in admin panel to manage agent statuses, metrics, and brief content
Dark premium design with OKLCH color system
